name: Sales Pipeline Pulse
description: Each morning it gives you a read on your deals: what is moving, what is stuck, and who needs a nudge today. Keeps the pipeline from running on memory and guesswork.
prompt_template: Give me a short read on my sales pipeline today. Using my leads, contacts, recent email, and notes, group deals by where they stand, flag the ones gone quiet or overdue for a follow-up, and call out the few worth my attention today. Keep it brief and put the most important things first. Give it to me as a draft to read.
